parent_issue: POL-233 — ANALYZE: Normalize SmartDocs routing, folder cognition, YAML links, and telemetry cleanup

assessment.summary: POL-233 requires SmartDocs normalization across 6 dimensions. The core gap is that smartdocs/ has zero cognition coverage (0 POLARIS.md/SUMMARY.md files), no atlas routes, no canonical frontmatter schema for relationships, and a redundant docs/ nesting. Legacy telemetry surfaces (evo-run, bootstrap-run) are deprecated with no active writers. Path migration is the highest-risk item and must be deferred to last.
key_findings: smartdocs/ and all 12 stable subdirectories have zero POLARIS.md or SUMMARY.md files.
No smartdocs/ content paths appear in .polaris/map/file-routes.json (128 smartdocs refs are all src/smartdocs-engine/ source entries).
CANONICAL_TARGET = 'smartdocs/docs' hardcoded in ingest.ts; 22 occurrences across 9 non-test source files.
parseFrontMatter() supports governance fields only; no canonical relationship schema (implements, related, source_paths) exists.
evo-run and bootstrap-run surfaces in .taskchain_artifacts/ have no active skill or writer — classified deprecated.
docs-ingest and polaris-docs-ingest coexist — docs-ingest is compatibility-only (renamed).
worker-telemetry-spec.md (POL-215) is authoritative; worker-acknowledged event gap remains in src/loop/worker.ts (tracked under POL-215, not this issue).

implement_parent: POL-234 — IMPLEMENT: Normalize SmartDocs routing, folder cognition, YAML links, and telemetry cleanup
